name: Berberine
summary: Plant-derived isoquinoline alkaloid tracked as a preclinical AMPK/SIRT1/PGC-1alpha metabolic modulator for aging-relevant muscle and cognitive endpoints.
mechanism_summary: Preclinical aging studies link berberine to AMPK/SIRT1/PGC-1alpha signaling, glucose handling, oxidative-stress markers, and mitochondrial biology, but human aging outcomes are not established.

open_questions: Whether AMPK-linked rat functional signals reproduce in larger mammalian aging models
Whether human metabolic berberine studies can be connected to validated aging-relevant biomarkers or function
How dose, formulation, and interaction risks should be handled before geroscience use
